tool.name: list_available_playbooks
tool.description: List all attack playbooks — structured YAML files defining phases/objectives/techniques/sub-agents for specific target types (web, TMA, smart contract, AD, mobile).

tool.name: load_playbook
tool.description: Load a playbook's full structure for the current agent to follow. Returns XML block with phases, objectives, techniques, and sub-agent definitions for create_agent.
